_doc: Throwaway fixture for the Karpathy gate: 'one profile scaffolded end-to-end from skill, lint pass'. Profile name uses the `xfail-` prefix so the lint-all sweep and any cron scans can spot it as a test artifact. Cleanup: rm -rf hermes/profiles/xfail-scaffold-test and revert the fleet/limits.json entry.
description: Throwaway profile to verify hermes/skills/profile-from-template scaffolds cleanly.
